worktree_state.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <!-- Material Design 3 Primary Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_primary">#6750A4</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onPrimary">#FFFFFF</color>
    <color name="md_theme_primaryContainer">#EADDFF</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onPrimaryContainer">#21005D</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Secondary Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_secondary">#625B71</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onSecondary">#FFFFFF</color>
    <color name="md_theme_secondaryContainer">#E8DEF8</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onSecondaryContainer">#1D192B</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Tertiary Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_tertiary">#7D5260</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onTertiary">#FFFFFF</color>
    <color name="md_theme_tertiaryContainer">#FFD8E4</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onTertiaryContainer">#31111D</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Error Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_error">#B3261E</color>
    <color name="md_theme_errorContainer">#F9DEDC</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onError">#FFFFFF</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onErrorContainer">#410E0B</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Background Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_background">#FFFBFE</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onBackground">#1C1B1F</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Surface Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_surface">#FFFBFE</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onSurface">#1C1B1F</color>
    <color name="md_theme_surfaceVariant">#E7E0EC</color>
    <color name="md_theme_onSurfaceVariant">#49454F</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Outline Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_outline">#79747E</color>
    <color name="md_theme_outlineVariant">#CAC4D0</color>

    <!-- Material Design 3 Other Colors -->
    <color name="md_theme_inverseSurface">#313033</color>
    <color name="md_theme_inverseOnSurface">#F4EFF4</color>
    <color name="md_theme_inversePrimary">#D0BCFF</color>
    <color name="md_theme_shadow">#000000</color>
    <color name="md_theme_surfaceTint">#6750A4</color>
    <color name="md_theme_scrim">#000000</color>

    <!-- Legacy Material Design Colors (for compatibility) -->
    <color name="purple_200">#FFBB86FC</color>
    <color name="purple_500">#FF6200EE</color>
    <color name="purple_700">#FF3700B3</color>
    <color name="teal_200">#FF03DAC5</color>
    <color name="teal_700">#FF018786</color>
    <color name="black">#FF000000</color>
    <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>

    <!-- Common UI Colors -->
    <color name="divider">#1F000000</color>
    <color name="ripple">#1F000000</color>
</resources>

task_intent.title: 001-initialize-project-scaffolding-with-standard-andro
task_intent.description: Scaffold a standard Android project structure with Gradle build files, an Application class, a main Activity, and a manifest. This establishes the foundational code patterns that all future features will build upon.

worktree_state.content:
